title: Backend server starts on port 8000
description: The FastAPI backend must start and respond to HTTP requests on port 8000. This is the foundation for all API interactions.
setup: Run init.sh to start all services
Wait for backend to be healthy
steps: RUN 'curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8000/api/health' and verify the response is 200
VERIFY the response body is valid JSON containing a 'status' field
expected_outcome: Backend server starts on port 8000

title: Frontend serves index page on port 5199

VERIFY no console errors appear in the browser
expected_outcome: Frontend serves index page on port 5199
